EditTextPreference.app:title: Filter stories
EditTextPreference.app:summary: Hide stories based on words in title
EditTextPreference.app:dialogMessage: Separate phrases by commas, capitalization is ignored

EditTextPreference.app:title: Filter stories by domain
EditTextPreference.app:summary: Hide stories based on domain name
EditTextPreference.app:dialogMessage: Separate phrases by commas, capitalization is ignored

EditTextPreference.app:title: Filter user comments
EditTextPreference.app:summary: Hide comments by the specified users
EditTextPreference.app:dialogMessage: Separate usernames by commas, capitalization is ignored
